title: The Fog of Possibilities
description: You know one ingredient exactly. The other has a known aspect. Which potions are still possible?

hints.text: Ingredient 1 is fully identified as PPP (all aspects +). Focus on ingredient 2: its R+ aspect tells you which alchemicals it can be.
The R+ alchemicals are R+G−B+, R+G−B−, and R+G+B−. But PPP is already taken, so ingredient 2 must be one of the remaining three. Mix each with PPP and collect the distinct results.
mix(PPP, R+G−B+) = R+, mix(PPP, R+G−B−) = R+, mix(PPP, R+G+B−) = G+. Answer: R+ and G+. Three suspects — two possible potions.
